title: Outlook Email — professional reading-pane reskin
description:
Redesigned the PipeSync Outlook Email page for a cleaner, more professional mail-client feel. Folder tabs are now a subtle segmented control instead of loud orange glow pills. The message list uses left accent bars, tighter typography, and muted unread chips. The reading pane has a structured header (From/To/Date labels), compact action toolbar, and a soft paper-style frame for HTML email bodies so third-party messages no longer sit in a harsh white box on dark chrome.

Production Ready V1 theme adds green selection accents and refined panel shadows on email. Presentation only — no email API or handler changes.

Who is affected: PipeSync users on pipeshare.live who use Outlook Email.
changeLog: Email: segmented folder tabs replace orange gradient pill glow.
Email: reading pane with labeled metadata header and compact actions.
Email: paper-style body frame for HTML messages (softer contrast).
Email: list rows with accent bars and subtle unread/attachment chips.
Production Ready V1: green email selection accents and panel polish.
